channel.title: Database on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Database on Arrans github.io

item.title: dolthub/dolt
item.description: Dolt – Git for Data

item.title: eosphoros-ai/DB-GPT
item.description: AI Native Data App Development framework with AWEL(Agentic Workflow Expression Language) and Agents

item.title: neondatabase/neon
item.description: Neon: Serverless Postgres. We separated storage and compute to offer autoscaling, code-like database branching, and scale to zero.

item.title: nutsdb/nutsdb
item.description: A simple, fast, embeddable, persistent key/value store written in pure Go. It supports fully serializable transactions and many data structures such as list, set, sorted set.

item.title: dolthub/go-mysql-server
item.description: A MySQL-compatible relational database with a storage agnostic query engine. Implemented in pure Go.

item.title: supabase/supabase
item.description: The open source Firebase alternative. Supabase gives you a dedicated Postgres database to build your web, mobile, and AI applications.

item.title: etcd-io/etcd
item.description: Distributed reliable key-value store for the most critical data of a distributed system

item.title: boltdb/bolt
item.description: An embedded key/value database for Go.

item.title: pingcap/tidb
item.description: TiDB is an open-source, cloud-native, distributed, MySQL-Compatible database for elastic scale and real-time analytics. Try AI-powered Chat2Query free at : https://www.pingcap.com/tidb-serverless/

item.title: nalgeon/redka
item.description: Redis re-implemented with SQLite

item.title: EchoVault/EchoVault
item.description: Embeddable and distributed in-memory alternative to Redis.

item.title: dgraph-io/badger
item.description: Fast key-value DB in Go.

item.title: pawelsalawa/sqlitestudio
item.description: A free, open source, multi-platform SQLite database manager.

item.title: typedb/typedb
item.description: TypeDB: the polymorphic database powered by types

item.title: golang-migrate/migrate
item.description: Database migrations. CLI and Golang library.

item.title: isar/isar
item.description: Extremely fast, easy to use, and fully async NoSQL database for Flutter

item.title: lotusdblabs/lotusdb
item.description: Most advanced key-value database written in Go, extremely fast, compatible with LSM tree and B+ tree.

item.title: dbcli/mycli
item.description: A Terminal Client for MySQL with AutoCompletion and Syntax Highlighting.

item.title: codenotary/immudb
item.description: immudb - immutable database based on zero trust, SQL/Key-Value/Document model, tamperproof, data change history

item.title: nakabonne/tstorage
item.description: An embedded time-series database

item.title: tidwall/buntdb
item.description: BuntDB is an embeddable, in-memory key/value database for Go with custom indexing and geospatial support

item.title: zombiezen/go-sqlite
item.description: Low-level Go interface to SQLite 3

item.title: objectbox/objectbox-go
item.description: Embedded Go Database, the fast alternative to SQLite, gorm, etc.

item.title: OmniDB/OmniDB
item.description: Web tool for database management

item.title: objectbox/objectbox-dart
item.description: Flutter database for super-fast Dart object persistence

item.title: marioreggiori/objectdb
item.description: Persistent embedded document-oriented NoSQL database for Dart and Flutter.

item.title: bmatsuo/lmdb-go
item.description: Bindings for the LMDB C library

item.title: alexhallam/fwdt
item.description: 🔥 📝 (fwdt) “few word do trick” is a cross platform manual fast logger
